d: Mikola generates a 2-tile Courage Sphere that follows her around, increasing Haste by [[40]] and Ranged DEF by [[10]] for all allies within range, while increasing her own Haste by [[30]] and Ranged DEF by [[10]]. When Mikola deals total damage equal to [[300%]] of her initial ATK while Courage Sphere is around, a Healing Wave will emerge, restoring [[80%]]<ATK> HP to all allies within range. Courage Sphere lasts for [[10]]s.
Increases the healing amount of Healing Wave to [[90%]]<ATK>.
Increases the duration of Courage Sphere to [[12]]s.
Increases the healing amount of Healing Wave to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases the healing amount of Healing Wave to [[110%]]<ATK>.

Mikola generates an Honor Arena spanning the battlefield when a battle starts, lasting until the battle ends. The side with more units within the arena will gain control of it after maintaining the advantage for [[3]]s.
Mikola restores all allies' HP by [[12%]]<ATK> per second and increases their ATK by [[14%]] when her side gains control of the Honor Arena.
Increases all allies' ATK by [[16%]] when Mikola's side gains control of the Honor Arena.
Increases all allies' ATK by [[18%]] when Mikola's side gains control of the Honor Arena.
Increases all allies' ATK by [[20%]] when Mikola's side gains control of the Honor Arena.
Mikola rings her bell, restoring [[130%]]<ATK> HP and increasing Phys & Magic DEF by [[40%]] for herself and the [[2]] [[weakest|weakest]] allies for [[5]]s.
Increases HP recovery amount to [[150%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery amount to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery amount to [[190%]]<ATK>.
Mikola increases her ATK by [[9%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[6%]] ATK when her side gains control of the Honor Arena.
Mikola increases her ATK by [[12%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[8%]] ATK when her side gains control of the Honor Arena.
Mikola increases her ATK by [[15%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[10%]] ATK when her side gains control of the Honor Arena.

Mikola enhances her Courage Sphere after it has been active for [[6]]s, granting Combat Fury to all allied heroes (except herself) within range, and dealing damage equal to [[50%]] of her ATK per second to enemies adjacent to these allies. The enhancements reset when the Courage Sphere disappears.
Increases Mikola's damage dealt per second to enemies adjacent to allies carrying Combat Fury to [[60%]] of her ATK.
Increases [[30]] Vitality for allies carrying Combat Fury.
Increases Mikola's damage dealt per second to enemies adjacent to allies carrying Combat Fury to [[70%]] of her ATK.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: Mikola's Courage Sphere remains unaffected in duration if her side gains control of the Honor Arena.
